S.FORM: == bcilung == maki cka bcilung ga kyan 'cyux, kbolung ru kmalang. 'sya bcilung ga kmtux tnlaman hmali ta.
S.PHON: == βʦ~ʨiluŋ == maki ʦ~ʨka βʦ~ʨiluŋ ɣa kjan ʔʦ~ʨjux, kβoluŋ ru kmalaŋ. ʔs~ɕja βʦ~ʨiluŋ ɣa kmtux tnlaman ħmali ta.
S.FORM: == bcilung == maki cka bcilung ga kyan 'cyux, kbolung ru kmalang. 'sya bcilung ga kmtux tnlaman hmali ta.
S.PHON: == βʦ~ʨiluŋ == maki ʦ~ʨka βʦ~ʨiluŋ ɣa kjan ʔʦ~ʨjux, kβoluŋ ru kmalaŋ. ʔs~ɕja βʦ~ʨiluŋ ɣa kmtux tnlaman ħmali ta.
